steps.title: Read the graph and identify which fuel has the highest bar
steps.content:
The graph shows energy density (MJ/L) for four fuels. Scan each bar:
  • Choice A — jet fuel.: jet fuel's bar is high but does not reach the top of the graph. ✗
  • Choice B — POP biofuel.: POP biofuel's bar is visibly the tallest, reaching approximately 40 MJ/L — higher than every other fuel shown. ✓
  • Choice C — ethanol.: ethanol's bar is the shortest on the graph, well below POP biofuel. ✗
  • Choice D — gasoline.: gasoline's bar sits below POP biofuel's bar. ✗

steps.title: Match the tallest bar to the correct answer
steps.content: Only one fuel has the highest energy density on the graph. POP biofuel's bar reaches the highest point, making it the answer the sentence calls for. That is the correct answer.
